prompt: Cinematic Hollywood film still of a dark-skinned woman in a rainy neon cyberpunk city at night, framed as a medium full-body portrait with the subject crouching low in the street, one knee raised and one arm resting casually on it, facing camera with a confident, calm presence. Shot on ARRI Alexa 65 with Panavision anamorphic lenses, subtle organic Kodak Vision3 film grain, shallow depth of field, creamy oval bokeh, dramatic volumetric cinematic lighting, high contrast, glossy reflections, premium blockbuster color grading. The subject has dark curly hair pulled up in a messy high tied style with loose wet strands, 1 visible dangling metallic earring, and minimal visible cybernetic facial circuitry with 2 glowing eye implants implied by the cybernetic design. Outfit has 3 key pieces: a metallic purple bomber jacket with bright neon blue LED piping tracing the collar, zipper line, chest seam, and both sleeves; a dark inner top; and black designer tactical pants with fitted panels and 2 visible buckle straps around the knee and thigh area. Add 1 illuminated tech module on the upper sleeve of the jacket. Background is a dense futuristic alley or street canyon with tall blurred buildings, wet atmosphere, vertical neon signage in cyan, magenta, blue, and warm amber, soft fog, and distant practical lights. Emphasize glossy fabric texture, rain-slick urban mood, moody blue-purple palette, realistic skin detail, luxe sci-fi fashion editorial energy, and a photoreal cinematic portrait aesthetic.
